title: Sātkhira Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sātkhira, with a Z-Score of +3.86. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Sātkhira is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 76%, and the wind speed is 11.9 km/h, contributing to the discomfort. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, but the CDD is significantly high, posing a threat to the population.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
